title: ChatGPT Image Handoff
summary: Route image jobs across ordinary ChatGPT with Computer Use, optional ZIP batches, built-in generation, manual handoff, or local rendering with readable-text fact boundaries, resumable import, and visual QA.
user_needs: continue an image batch when built-in ImageGen is unavailable or flaky
use ChatGPT image generation through Computer Use when the capability exists
test a checked multi-image ZIP archive when the active ChatGPT surface supports native archive delivery
fall back to a manual prompt pack when browser automation is unavailable
import external image results under stable names and resume local QA
prevent generated cards from inventing hashes, identifiers, filenames, or metrics
finish a visible generated background locally with exact allowlisted text while preserving its series style
